generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Vintage woodcut texture, limited earthy color palette. Clean bold black ink outlines. NO BORDERS. FULL BLEED IMAGE. ANTHROPOMORPHIC: Five Taiwan leopard cats ALL STRICTLY STANDING UPRIGHT ON TWO LEGS, engaging in a complex but non-violent scramble in a forest corridor. Each cat holds a wooden wand FIRMLY WITH ITS PAWS. No floating objects or ghost hands. Slender and agile feline build. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white muzzle, and large white spots behind black ears. No baked-in text.
generation.narrative: Five leopard cats in a newly reconnected corridor engage in a symbolic struggle, representing the healthy friction of a recovering population integrating into new territories.

meanings.upright: Competition, conflict, habitat friction, the challenge of integrating into new ranges.
meanings.reversed: Resolution, harmony after struggle, or failing to establish a presence in a new area.

ecology.risk_theme: high density during corridor initial phase
ecology.mapping_note: Five of Wands represents the 'Integration Friction'—the initial competition that occurs when restoration efforts first connect previously isolated populations.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：newly connected territory 。 生存威脅：high density during corridor initial phase 。 牌義關聯：Five of Wands represents the 'Integration Friction'—the initial competition that occurs when restoration efforts first connect previously isolated populations. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：adult-males

website.excerpt: A chaotic spar for space, representing the challenges of population integration in restored landscapes.
website.seo_description: Five of Wands reimagined as leopard cat competition in newly connected habitats.

meaning.zh: 競爭、衝突、棲地摩擦，以及進入新環境時的調適挑戰。
meaning.en: Competition, conflict, habitat friction, and the challenge of integrating into new ranges.
